sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34908" key="e)napoikodome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναποικοδομέω</orth>, <sense id="n34908.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">enclose by a wall</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινά</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:8:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.51</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
